- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or database URLs
- [ ] Static assets in `public/` still load correctly
- [ ] API routes in `api/` export a default handler function
- [ ] `vercel.json` is valid JSON (if modified)
- [ ] `package.json` is valid JSON (if modified)
